extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the package seal was torn open.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the package and its top seal, which appears creased but not torn open.

result.user_claim: Customer: Package seal side se open jaisa lag raha tha. | Agent: Torn-open package claim? | Customer: Haan, mujhe lag raha hai package torn open tha. | Agent: Missing item bhi hai? | Customer: Nahi, sirf package torn-open review.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed seal with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (torn_packaging) is not visible. Images show 'none' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
